description: harness-core — credential leak prevention + workflow guardrails (defense-in-depth; this file is the authoritative hook set)

hooks.command: test -x "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" && grep -Fqx '# HARNESS_HOOK_DISPATCHER_ID=claude-harness/v1' "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" 2>/dev/null || exec bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/stall_autocontinue.sh"; exec "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" harness-core hooks/stall_autocontinue.sh

test -x "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" && grep -Fqx '# HARNESS_HOOK_DISPATCHER_ID=claude-harness/v1' "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" 2>/dev/null || { python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/sr_depth_gate.py" --hook 2>/dev/null || exit 0; exit 0; }; "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" harness-core hooks/sr_depth_gate.py --hook 2>/dev/null || exit 0
